name_en: 💙💙 This Dior Book Tote bag, designed by Dior Women's Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri, is a flagship piece embodying Dior aesthetics. It can hold various daily essentials, meticulously crafted from blue Denim Dior Oblique jacquard fabric, reinterpreting Dior's classic pattern with an irregular stone-washed effect to showcase modern charm. Medium size, featuring a contrasting Christian Dior Paris logo on the front, showcasing Dior's exquisite craftsmanship, and can be carried by hand.
name_cn:

Code: 1296
Size: 36 x 27.5 x 16.5 cm (L x H x W)
